data.body: LIVE-CHECK ATTESTATION (dogfood, 2026-07-13): the land contract was exercised end-to-end against the live Gerrit 3.14.1 instance — Autosubmit+1 was set on submittable change #618 (the land action) and the deployed auto-lander landed it: #618 MERGED, submitter 'Rebar Bot Nava', after a live rebase-to-tip + fresh Verified+1 on Patch Set 3. https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/618
